scenarios.description: Project has no lesson records; command center shows guided capture empty state.
Draft exists but missing root cause and evidence; submit action disabled with validation list.
Lesson submitted and awaiting PM/PX review.
Vendor-sensitive lesson returns redacted record for executive-readonly viewer.

HBI suggestion panel shows degraded state while core lesson workflow remains usable.
Evidence source status warning shown without blocking approved project-only record.
